title: What Happens at a Jewish Funeral? A Complete Guide
title_zh: 犹太葬礼完整指南:从逝世到安葬的全过程
title_he: מה קורה בלוויה יהודית? מדריך מלא
author: Torah Light Project
cultural_parallels: Chinese concept of 善终 (shàn zhōng) - a good death
守孝 (shǒu xiào) - observing mourning period for parents
孝 (xiào) - filial piety aligns with honoring parents in death
Ancestral veneration parallels Jewish memory practices

historical_periods.chinese_equivalent: Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty (三国与晋朝)

target_audience: Chinese native Mandarin speakers with no background in Judaism
